TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Masinghalan = 147 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 592 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 569 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 23 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 89%, Cou 5%, Paiwan 1%, Kanakanavu 1%.
S.PHON: = masiŋħalan = *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, ʦou *%, paiwan *%, kanakana*u *%.
S.FORM: = Masinghalan = 147 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 592 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 569 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 23 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 89%, Cou 5%, Paiwan 1%, Kanakanavu 1%.
S.PHON: = masiŋħalan = *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, ʦou *%, paiwan *%, kanakana*u *%.
